perturbation.original_text: All Informa tion provided to review the business will be returned to the Franchisee without retaining companies, summaries, analyses or extracts there of in the event the review is terminated.
perturbation.changed_text: All Information provided to review the business may be retained even if the review is terminated.
perturbation.explanation: The original text mandates the return of all Information and prohibits retention of summaries or analyses if the review is terminated. The modified text permits retention even after termination, directly contradicting the previous requirement. This in-text contradiction concerns how the information is handled after review termination.
perturbation.contradicted_text: “Information” shall include the fact that the business is for sale. The term Information also includes data generally available to the public or already in your possession. All Information provided to review the business may be retained even if the review is terminated. That I will not contact the Seller, his employees, supplies or custom ers except through Tameracq Partners, Inc.
perturbation.justification: The original text requires all information to be returned and prohibits retention after review termination. The changed text explicitly allows the retention of information even after the termination of the review. This directly contradicts the previous requirement as explained, and therefore a direct conflict is created, in this case a Structural Flaw in Text Contradiction. The contradictory text occurs in the same section.

perturbation.original_text: That I will not contact the Seller, his employees, supplies or custom ers except through Tameracq Partners, Inc.
perturbation.changed_text: That I may contact the Seller, his employees, supplies or customers at any time.
perturbation.explanation: The original text strictly prohibits direct contact with the Seller and related parties, mandating all communication through Tameracq Partners, Inc. The modified text allows direct contact at any time, creating a direct contradiction concerning allowed communication channels. This in-text contradiction gives uncertainty on allowed communications between the signing party and the seller.
perturbation.contradicted_text: That I may contact the Seller, his employees, supplies or customers at any time. That all Information is provided by the Seller and is not verified in any way by Tameracq Partners, Inc. Tameracq Partners, Inc is relying on Seller for the accuracy and completeness of said Information, has no knowle dge of the accuracy of said Information and makes no warranty, expressed or implied, as to such Information.
perturbation.justification: The original text forbids any contact with the seller except through Tameracq Partners, Inc. The changed text explicitly allows contact with the seller at any time. This directly contradicts the original restriction, creating a strong in-text contradiction with the contradicted text, which includes the changed text. This creates uncertainty about the allowed communication channels and makes it impossible to enforce one over the other.

perturbation.original_text: That, prior to finalizing an agreement to purchase a busine ss, it is my responsibility to make an independent verification of all information. I agree that Tameracq Partners, Inc is not responsible for the accuracy of any Informati on I received and I agree to indemnify and hold Tameracq Partners, Inc harmless from any claims or damages resulting from its use. I will look only to Seller and to my own investigation for all information regarding any business offered by the Franchisee.
perturbation.changed_text: Tameracq Partners, Inc. is responsible for verifying all information provided, and the potential investor is not required to conduct independent verification. I am not responsible for the accuracy of any Information I received.
perturbation.explanation: This change flips the responsibility for information verification. The original text places the onus on the potential investor to independently verify all information and absolves Tameracq Partners, Inc. of any responsibility. The modified text makes Tameracq Partners, Inc. responsible and removes the investor's obligation, creating a direct in-text contradiction about who is responsible for the data accuracy.
perturbation.contradicted_text: That, prior to finalizing an agreement to purchase a busine ss, it is my responsibility to make an independent verification of all information. Tameracq Partners, Inc. is responsible for verifying all information provided, and the potential investor is not required to conduct independent verification. I am not responsible for the accuracy of any Information I received. That, should I enter into an agreement to pur chase a business the Franchisee offers for sale, I grant to the Seller the right to obtain, through standard reporting agencies, financial and credit information concerning my self or the companies or other parties I represent and understand that this informa tion will be held conf idential by Seller and Tameracq Partners, Inc and will only be used for the purpose of Seller extending credit to me.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text regarding responsibility for verifying information. The original text and contradicted text state that the investor is responsible for independent verification, while the changed text states Tameracq Partners, Inc. is responsible, creating a clear and direct conflict about who bears this responsibility. This aligns with the 'Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction' definition as the modified clause is placed in the same section with conflicting implications.

perturbation.original_text: That all correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the purchase or lease or any business presented to me, or companies I represent, by the Blockbuster Franchisee, will be conducted excl usively through Tameracq Partners, Inc.
perturbation.changed_text: Correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase, and negotiations relating to the purchase or lease of any business can be conducted directly with the Seller or through Tameracq Partners, Inc.
perturbation.explanation: The original text mandates that all communications related to the purchase or lease of the business must be conducted exclusively through Tameracq Partners, Inc. The modified text now allows direct communication with the Seller, offering an alternative and contradicting the original exclusive channel. This in-text contradiction presents uncertainty about the correct method of communication.
perturbation.contradicted_text: That, should I enter into an agreement to pur chase a business the Franchisee offers for sale, I grant to the Seller the right to obtain, through standard reporting agencies, financial and credit information concerning my self or the companies or other parties I represent and understand that this informa tion will be held conf idential by Seller and Tameracq Partners, Inc and will only be used for the purpose of Seller extending credit to me. Correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase, and negotiations relating to the purchase or lease of any business can be conducted directly with the Seller or through Tameracq Partners, Inc. Agreed to and accepted: Name (signature)______________________________Date _______________________
perturbation.justification: The original text states that all communications must go through Tameracq Partners, Inc. The changed text allows direct communication with the seller, which contradicts the original requirement of exclusive communication through Tameracq Partners, Inc. The contradicted text includes this change. The change creates a contradiction because the contract now presents two different and conflicting methods for conducting communications, creating uncertainty about the appropriate method.
